title: Query results in a segmentation fault
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
clickhouse version： 25.6.2.5
system: centos
table schame:
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasp.system_asset_info ON CLUSTER cluster_1st
(
`asset` String,
`asset_type` Enum8('ip' = 1, 'domain' = 2)',
`ip_country` String',
`ip_province` String
`ip_city` String ,
`ip_district` String ,
`ip_network_type` String ,
`ip_isp_cate` String ,
`asset_source` String,
`evidence_domain` LowCardinality(String) ',
`unit_name` String,
`update_time` DateTime DEFAULT now()
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedReplacingMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{layer}-{shard}/sasp/system_asset_info', '{replica}', update_time)
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(update_time)
PRIMARY KEY asset
ORDER BY asset
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192, merge_with_ttl_timeout = 7200, parts_to_throw_insert = 500, ttl_only_drop_parts = 1, use_minimalistic_part_header_in_zookeeper = 1, storage_policy = 'all';
```
The worst-case scenario is that the query fails, not that the ClickHouse application crashes.
```bash
2025.07.29 14:15:47.105100 [ 19207 ] {} <Error> bool DB::WriteBufferFromHTTPServerResponse::cancelWithException(HTTPServerRequest &, int, const std::string &, WriteBuffer *): Failed to send exception to the response write buffer.: Code: 236. DB::Exception: Write buffer has been canceled. (ABORTED), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000000fbf2bfb
1. DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x0000000009d916ec
2. DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x0000000009d9da6b
3. DB::WriteBufferFromHTTPServerResponse::cancelWithException(DB::HTTPServerRequest&, int, String const&, DB::WriteBuffer*) @ 0x00000000155c2682
4. DB::InterserverIOHTTPHandler::handleRequest(DB::HTTPServerRequest&, DB::HTTPServerResponse&, StrongTypedef<unsigned long, ProfileEvents::EventTag> const&) @ 0x0000000015516676
5. DB::HTTPServerConnection::run() @ 0x00000000155b9be9
6. Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x0000000018cf4627
7. Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x0000000018cf4a79
8. Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x0000000018cbfa7b
9. Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) @ 0x0000000018cbdf5d
10. start_thread @ 0x0000000000007ea5
11. __clone @ 0x00000000000feb0d
(version 25.6.2.5 (official build))

2025.07.29 14:16:34.360735 [ 26502 ] {} <Fatal> BaseDaemon: Signal description: Segmentation fault

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasp_system_asset_info (asset TEXT, asset_type TEXT CHECK(asset_type IN ('ip', 'domain')), ip_country TEXT, ip_province TEXT, ip_city TEXT, ip_district TEXT, ip_network_type TEXT, ip_isp_cate TEXT, asset_source TEXT, evidence_domain TEXT, unit_name TEXT, update_time DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO sasp_system_asset_info (asset, asset_type, ip_country, ip_province, ip_city, ip_district, ip_network_type, ip_isp_cate, asset_source, evidence_domain, unit_name) VALUES ('192.168.1.1', 'ip', 'US', 'California', 'Los Angeles', 'Downtown', 'Broadband', 'ISP1', 'Source1', 'example.com', 'Unit1');

INSERT INTO sasp_system_asset_info (asset, asset_type, ip_country, ip_province, ip_city, ip_district, ip_network_type, ip_isp_cate, asset_source, evidence_domain, unit_name) VALUES ('example.com', 'domain', NULL, 'New York', 'New York City', 'Manhattan', 'Fiber', 'ISP2', 'Source2', 'example.org', 'Unit2');
SELECT asset, asset_type, ip_country FROM sasp_system_asset_info WHERE ip_country IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sasp_system_asset_info WHERE asset_type = 'ip' AND ip_city = 'Los Angeles';
key_bug_features: Segmentation fault during query execution in ClickHouse
